docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, GRACIELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL $3,433.97 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,548.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO'S MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT ISSUED AUGUST 29, 2016.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MICHAEL CAMPESINO IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,443.97 FILED BY ESPINOZA, GRACIELA AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
FILED AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE FROM SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPT. STATING THAT SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND AND SFSD WAS NOT ABLE TO GAIN ENTRY INTO BUILDING.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF HAVE AGREED TO SETTLE AND DEFENDANT HAS PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF $220.00 IN CASH IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 08/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 SERVED JUL-30-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-12-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA & DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO (VIA TELEPHONE). COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER KARINA MCMILLAN-REA ASSISTED PLAINTIFF AT TODAY'S HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT PURSUANT TO A PRIOR AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, MR. CAMPESINO WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO'S REQUEST TO APPEAR VIA COURTCALL AT THE JANUARY 12TH HEARING. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO PLAINITFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/21/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO. JESUS ESPINOZA WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE AND SUPPORTING DECLARATION. REQUEST GRANTED. FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL
REMARK: ORDER RE MOTION TO VACATE AND ORDER AFTER HEARING/NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/28/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAIVED SERVICE ON 11-9-16. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/13/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED-RETURN TO SENDER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF BOTH PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE ON MOTION TO VACATE - UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER RE: FILE DESTROYED PER AUGUST 19, 2021 ORDER
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR SEP-28-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/14/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MICHAEL CAMPESINO IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO NOV-09-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA. JESUS ESPINOZA WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. PURSUANT TO A PRIOR ORDER OF THE COURT, DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO APPEARED VIA TELEPHONE. AT THE HEARING, DEFENDANT AGREED TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, AND TO ACCEPT ALL FUTURE SERVICE VIA EMAIL AT MCAMPESINO@GMAIL.COM. DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR VIA TELEPHONE AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE PROVIDED THE REQUISITE DOCUMENTS ARE FILED WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE. PARTIES SHALL EXCHANGE ALL DOCUMENTS VIA EMAIL. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF GRACIELA ESPINOZA RE: OPPOSITION TO REQUEST TO POSTPONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, GRACIELA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, GRACIELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL $205.14 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.14 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPESINO, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
